productDisplayName: Timberland Men Claremont Popl Olive Shirt
description: Olive full sleeves shirt made of 100% organic cotton, with tape detailing on inseam of the collar, appliqued brand logo on the facing placket, patch pocket on left chest with black thread detailing and embroidered logo, full length button placket with embroidered logo on right sleeve, and curved hemlineThis shirt has been manufactured in an environment-friendly manner with the aim to reduce Carbon Footprint.
